name: Pollution
description: A noxious smog has flowed onto the battle field, just a sniff and it already leaves your body feeling weak.
effect:
- All attacks gain 2 Chance Dice to inflict Poison on a Target.
- When attacking a target that is already Poisoned, roll 1 Chance die equal to the number of turns they have been suffering from Poison, if this roll succeeds the Poison becomes Badly Poisoned.
- All Poison Immunities become Resistances. Ignore all Immunities to Poison and Badly Poison Status.
- Poison Types instead heal 1 HP when Poisoned for the duration of the Weather.
